name: The Milf Juice
description:
"Hello Stranger!, I present to you, THE MILF JUICE, with one of these bottles, you can turn yourself into the sexiest and hottest Milf of the world... Yeah... the people prefer Milfs and that´s okay, you can be one or you close friend or anybody of the world can be a Milf with the Milf juice... SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR, GO AND BUY THE MILF JUICE TODAY!, AND BE THE ULTIMATE MILF!"


Inspired by a Krystal from Star Fox animation I present to you the Milf Juice bot, where everyone can be turned into a Milf.

Artist: Smuffysquid
creator: Amadeuscho
